summary: Performance refactor testing complete. Verified unified endpoints (/api/content/site-data and /api/content/homepage-data) work correctly, replacing 9 separate API calls with 2. All pages load correctly with SiteDataContext providing data to Navbar, Footer, and SEOHead. React.lazy code splitting working with PageLoader fallback. AdminBlog uses Cloudinary upload with 'Bilgisayardan Yukle' button.

minor.issue: Cache-Control headers set in code (max-age=60, max-age=30) are being overwritten by proxy/ingress to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. This is infrastructure config, not code bug.

passed_tests: Unified /api/content/site-data endpoint returns 200 with siteSettings, contact, seoSettings
Unified /api/content/homepage-data endpoint returns 200 with carousel, projects, heroFeatures, homeStats, homeCTA
Individual content endpoints still work (/site-settings, /contact, /seo-settings, /hero-features, /home-stats, /home-cta)
Admin login works with admin/admin123
Homepage loads with carousel, hero features, trust indicators, stats, projects, CTA
Navbar displays site name from SiteDataContext
Footer displays contact info from SiteDataContext (phone, email, address, social links)
SEOHead injects meta tags (title, description, keywords) from SiteDataContext
Structured data (JSON-LD) present in page head
Projects page loads with project cards and filters
Blog page loads with blog posts
About page loads correctly
Contact page loads with FAQ section
Hesaplama page loads with calculator tools
Mobile responsive layout works (trust indicators stacked, buttons stacked, hamburger menu)
AdminBlog shows 'Bilgisayardan Yukle' button for Cloudinary upload
SPA navigation works without full page reload
All carousel images load from Unsplash (no dead preview URLs)
All project main images load from Unsplash
React.lazy code splitting working with PageLoader fallback
action_items: OPTIONAL: Configure ingress/proxy to respect Cache-Control headers from backend for better caching performance

success_rate.backend: 92% (23/25 tests passed - 2 cache header tests failed due to proxy override)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance refactor verified working. Unified endpoints /api/content/site-data and /api/content/homepage-data replace 9 separate API calls. SiteDataContext provides siteSettings, contactInfo, seoSettings to all components. React.lazy code splitting implemented. AdminBlog uses cloudinaryAPI.upload. Cache headers set in code but overwritten by proxy - infrastructure issue not code bug.

unified_endpoints./api/content/site-data: Returns siteSettings + contact + seoSettings in single call
unified_endpoints./api/content/homepage-data: Returns carousel + projects + heroFeatures + homeStats + homeCTA in single call

components_using_SiteDataContext: Footer.jsx - uses useSiteData() for siteSettings and contactInfo
performance_refactor_verification.code_splitting: React.lazy implemented for all page components with Suspense fallback
